remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature with power less than or equal to the number of treasure counters on CARDNAME
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Gain control of target creature with power less than or equal to the number of treasure counters on CARDNAME. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may put a treasure counter on CARDNAME.
